mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password_hash, full_name, active, role FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id, username, password_hash, full_name, active, role FROM app_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user ( user_id, username, password_hash, full_name, active, role ) VALUES ( #{user.userId}, #{user.username}, #{user.passwordHash}, #{user.fullName}, #{user.active}, #{user.role} )
